visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a split-screen presentation. On the right side, a woman with long dark hair, wearing a gray scoop-neck t-shirt, is shown from the head and shoulders up, eating a bowl of pudding. On the left side, rapid visual cuts show hands demonstrating makeup techniques, applying spray and foundation to skin in a bright, indoor setting with flat white lighting. (2) The scene shifts to the woman in the center of the frame. She gestures expressively with her hands as she speaks directly to the camera. She holds a tall, white and clear spray bottle, presenting it as she explains a beauty method. The background is a clean, minimalist indoor room with soft shadows. (3) A close-up shot shows the woman applying the spray to her face, followed by her using her bare palms to rub liquid foundation into her cheeks and forehead. Her skin begins to exhibit a high-gloss, reflective texture. Yellow and white text captions appear frequently at the center and bottom of the frame. (4) The woman leans in closer to the camera to show the final result: a luminous, 'glass skin' effect. She touches her cheek with a finger and then shows the clean finger to the camera, demonstrating that the makeup does not transfer. Her expression is one of pleasant surprise and satisfaction. (5) The shot transitions to her holding a set of three skincare products: a spray, a serum, and a jar of cream. The packaging is consistent, featuring white caps and gray-speckled containers. She demonstrates the serum's twist-top mechanism, showing how the dropper emerges and retracts. (6) In the final phase, she applies the serum and cream in a specific sequence, showing the skin's texture becoming more hydrated and plump. Comparison shots of her skin over a two-week period are shown briefly, highlighting reduced redness and improved clarity. She concludes by holding the entire product line while smiling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 用手隨便推開就行? 韓網爆紅 拌拌水光肌. [Subtitle]: 跟拌飯做法一樣? 韓網流行底妝技巧!! [Variety]: (這個.... 真的可以嗎?). (2) [Slogan]: 要用「水水的噴霧」💧 太重太油的那種不行. 剛好我家裡有 ICD 映哲美的積雪草噴霧. (3) [Slogan]: 1.臉上噴上足夠的噴霧 2.還沒乾的時候直接上粉底 重點：一定要用手塗!! 3.中途再噴一次噴霧 繼續用手滾動推開. (4) [Variety]: 究竟結果呢? 天啊... 驚訝到. (5) [Slogan]: 好像真的有做韓式肌膚管理一樣.... 玻璃肌那種 帶來透明感!!! 超級神奇! 實測會不會掉妝. (6) [Slogan]: ICD 映哲美的「活妍系列」會讓肌膚變得超級水嫩Q彈 而且整個狀態變得更健康 很像韓系女神燈泡肌. (7) [Slogan]: 他們家有獨家技術 用了巨型積雪草跟外泌體科技 順序是：Boo-Se-Boo-Cream 先噴一次噴霧 再擦精華 然後再噴一次噴霧 最後是面霜. (8) [Slogan]: 精華的瓶蓋是旋轉設計 一轉到底就能自動取好一劑 不會沾手也不會浪費. (9) [Slogan]: 膚況不穩的時候用這組 紅腫真的會慢慢退掉 保濕也很足 皮膚會變得比較飽滿、彈潤! 上妝就比較服貼、不會浮粉. (10) [Slogan]: 如果你們也想要肌膚屏障變健康 想要自然透出光澤感 真的可以試試看這些韓國產品喔!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to camera and demonstrating makeup.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, wavy dark brown hair. She is wearing a simple gray t-shirt and has a natural but polished makeup look.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, neutral indoor environment, likely a home office or bedroom, with a white/beige wall and soft domestic lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-energy, mid-tempo electronic pop BGM featuring a strong 4/4 beat. A female voice enters immediately with high arousal and a bright tone, speaking in Traditional Chinese with rapid articulation. A soft 'whoosh' SFX underscores the first visual cut. (2) As the narrator explains the makeup method, the BGM continues as a steady, optimistic background layer. A 'ding' SFX (0:24) triggers as a key point is highlighted. The acoustic texture is crisp and bright, with high spectral centroid weights. (3) A distinct 'sh-sh' liquid spray sound is heard during the demo phase, followed by rhythmic tapping sounds as foundation is applied. The narrator's pitch variability increases when expressing excitement about the 'glass skin' results. (4) During the product introduction, a mechanical 'click' SFX (1:48) signifies the opening of the serum bottle. The vocal tone shifts from energetic to more informative and persuasive, maintaining clear broadcasting-level enunciation. (5) The video concludes with a swelling of the music's volume and a final rising vocal inflection from the narrator, ending on a positive and high-energy note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Demonstration -> Expert Evidence -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a viral Korean makeup technique for achieving 'glass skin' and to promote the ICD (Incellderm) skincare line as the essential foundation for this look. The video combines personal testimony with product demonstration to build trust and desire for the endorsed products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, explanation of brand technology, and recommendation of the product set to achieve specific skin results.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes social-media-native editing styles, including high text density and frequent SFX, to maintain viewer engagement throughout the detailed product review.
